data.title: Remove TaskCreate/TaskUpdate progress-checklist blocks from Phase 1 and Phase 3
data.description:
Remove all TaskCreate/TaskUpdate progress-checklist blocks from Phase 1 (pre-loop) and Phase 3 (per-batch) of plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md. Preserve any functional TaskCreate/TaskUpdate calls outside these blocks (Phase 7, Phase 8 post-loop checklist).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Phase 1 'Create Pre-Loop Progress Checklist' block and its TaskCreate items removed
- Phase 3 'Initialize Batch Progress Checklist' block and its TaskCreate items removed  
- Phase 7 'Initialize Post-Loop Progress Checklist' block preserved
- All TaskCreate/TaskUpdate references outside checklist blocks preserved
- bash tests/run-all.sh passes with 0 failures

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (edit)
